name: Guo Jia
lore: Cao Cao's strategist who excelled in countless battles. Against Yuan Shao, his predictions proved uncannily accurate. A master schemer, Cao Cao said: Only Guo Jia understands my mind.
battleCry:
Whatever schemes you devise,
it all falls within my grasp.

dialogue.greeting1:
So you're my lord for life?
I'm Guo Jia. Pleased to meet you.
dialogue.greeting2:
Master my abilities,
and I expect you'll do great things.
dialogue.goBattleBefore:
Let me train the troops so we can
execute my strategies swiftly.
dialogue.goBattle:
No loose ends? Good.
Let's move out.
dialogue.trainingExpect: The troops seem spirited today.
dialogue.mockBattle: Mock battle - just as I predicted.
dialogue.endTraining: Not bad. Not bad at all.

name: Sima Yi
lore: Wei's greatest strategist. Feigned illness to avoid service until Cao Cao summoned him. Served Emperors Cao Pi and Cao Rui, thwarting Zhuge Liang's invasions and crushing Gongsun Yuan's rebellion.
battleCry:
Prepare until victory is certain.
Gambling is for amateurs.

dialogue.greeting1: Hmph. A pleasure to meet you.
dialogue.greeting2:
I am Sima Yi Zhongda,
and I shall serve as your advisor.
dialogue.greeting3:
With my abilities,
I'll bring certain doom to our foes.
dialogue.goBattleBefore:
Allow me to train the troops
to perfect my strategies.
dialogue.goBattle: With me here, victory is assured.
dialogue.trainingExpect: Hmph. I'll drill them thoroughly today.
dialogue.tokkun: Entrust this to a capable general.
dialogue.mockBattle: Entrust this to a capable general.

name: Xun Yu
lore: Born to nobility, praised as one who could aid a king since youth. As Cao Cao's chief advisor, he supported him in all military and state affairs, laying the foundation for conquest.
battleCry:
Use my wisdom
to revive the nation.

tactics.name: Regroup
tactics.description: Return to castle and reduce revival

dialogue.greeting1:
My lord, pleased to meet you.
I am Xun Yu.
dialogue.greeting2:
My abilities will help guide you
on the path to greatness.
dialogue.goBattleBefore:
I'd like to train the troops
to sharpen our abilities.
dialogue.trainingExpect:
I sense today's training
will go well.
dialogue.tokkun: Let me select a general for this.
dialogue.mockBattle: Let me select a general for this.

name: Xun You
lore: Xun Yu's nephew who served Cao Cao on his recommendation. A meticulous planner who never revealed his schemes. Though outwardly dull, he hid courage within and loyally served as strategist.
battleCry:
Caution alone won't
bring your plans to life.

dialogue.greeting1:
Hey, great to meet you!
I'm Xun You. Let's work together.
dialogue.greeting2:
My abilities are easy to use
and handy in all sorts of situations.
dialogue.greeting3:
They'll definitely come in handy
in your battles!
dialogue.goBattleBefore:
Let me run some training
so we can use my skills better.
dialogue.trainingExpect:
Nice weather today!
Should go well.

name: Chen Qun
lore: Served three Wei rulers: Cao Cao, Cao Pi, and Cao Rui. His Nine Ranks system stabilized Wei's government. Advised Emperor Cao Rui in politics and war, rising to Minister of Works.
battleCry: Let me shape the battle I envision.

dialogue.greeting1:
It's an honor to meet you.
I am Chen Qun.
dialogue.greeting2: My abilities are tried and true techniques.
dialogue.greeting3:
I promise to bring
certain victory to your battles.
dialogue.goBattleBefore:
Let me conduct training
to sharpen our abilities.
dialogue.goBattle: Time to show what we've learned!
dialogue.trainingExpect: I sense today's training will go well.
dialogue.success: This training was a great success!

name: Zhuge Liang
lore: Genius strategist who joined Liu Bei after the Three Visits. Crucial at Red Cliffs and Shu's conquest. As Chancellor, he managed all state affairs and led multiple northern campaigns against Wei.
battleCry:
Three kingdoms into one...
My plan won't end at division.

dialogue.greeting1:
Pleased to meet you.
I am Kongming.
dialogue.greeting2:
From now on, I serve you as lord.
Let us work for the realm together.
dialogue.goBattleBefore:
Let me conduct training
to elevate our abilities.
dialogue.goBattle:
Time to march.
Do not let your guard down...
dialogue.trainingExpect:
The spirits favor us today.
Expect results.
dialogue.tokkun: Let me select a reliable general.

name: Ma Su
lore: Joined Liu Bei with his brother Ma Liang. Zhuge Liang's prized pupil in politics and war. During the Nanman campaign, he advised sparing Meng Huo, winning submission and ending future threats.
battleCry:
My strategy is flawless!
Execute it at once!

tactics.name: Regroup
tactics.description: Return to castle and reduce revival

dialogue.greeting1:
My lord, it's an honor to meet you!
I am Ma Su.
dialogue.greeting2:
With my perfect strategies,
I'll deliver overwhelming victory!
dialogue.goBattleBefore:
Let me train the troops
to perfect my strategies!
dialogue.trainingExpect: My genius is overflowing today!

name: Mi Zhu
lore: A wealthy merchant who became Liu Bei's patron during his wandering years, supporting him until Shu's conquest. So valued were his contributions that Liu Bei ranked him above even Zhuge Liang.
battleCry:
A...are you sure about this?
I'm not very confident

dialogue.greeting1:
Pleased to meet you.
I am Mi Zhu.
dialogue.greeting2:
I'd like to help you
conquer the realm, if I may.
dialogue.greeting3:
My abilities are easy to use,
so please make full use of them.
dialogue.goBattleBefore:
Well then, shall we train
to sharpen our abilities?
dialogue.trainingExpect: I have a good feeling about today.
dialogue.tokkun: I'll go select a general then!
dialogue.mockBattle: I'll go select a general then!
dialogue.hunting: How rare! Let's make it count!

name: Fa Zheng
lore: Once served Liu Zhang but, feeling undervalued, he encouraged Liu Bei to seize Shu. After joining Liu Bei, he urged the invasion of Hanzhong and was key to its capture as chief strategist.
battleCry:
At last, my talents
see the light of day...!

dialogue.greeting1:
I've been waiting to meet you!
I am Fa Zheng.
dialogue.greeting2:
With my abilities,
I'll surely guide you to greatness!
dialogue.goBattleBefore:
Let me train the troops
so we can act swiftly.
dialogue.trainingExpect: Today's training should go well.
dialogue.mockBattle:
I'll pick two generals
for mock battle.

name: Pang Tong
lore: Liu Bei's strategist called the Fledgling Phoenix, rivaling Zhuge Liang in wisdom. His Chained Ships scheme helped win Red Cliffs. After joining Liu Bei, he urged the conquest of Shu.
battleCry: Now they're pinned down, easy as that!

dialogue.greeting1:
So you're my lord, huh?
Name's Pang Tong.
dialogue.greeting2:
Use my unconventional strategies,
and victory is guaranteed.
dialogue.goBattleBefore:
Let me train the troops
so we can execute my plans better.
dialogue.trainingExpect: Got a good feeling about today.
dialogue.tokkun: Time to test my eye for talent.

name: Zhou Yu
lore: Sworn brother and strategist to Sun Ce. After his death, he served Sun Quan, defeating Cao Cao with fire at Red Cliffs. He planned to annex Shu but died at just 36.
battleCry:
Zhou Yu fights
for nothing less than the realm!

dialogue.greeting1:
My lord, it's an honor.
I am Zhou Yu.
dialogue.greeting2:
With my abilities,
I'll reduce our foes to ashes!
dialogue.goBattleBefore:
Let me train the troops
to execute my strategies flawlessly.
dialogue.goBattle:
Time to march.
Let's show them our strength!
dialogue.trainingExpect: An auspicious day - I sense success.
dialogue.mockBattle:
A mock battle.
I'd like to succeed.

name: Zhang Zhao
lore: A wise man who answered Sun Ce's call. After Sun Ce's death, he served Sun Quan, supporting the young lord while often admonishing him. Though many thought him fit, he never became Chancellor.
battleCry:
My lord, please
heed my counsel now!

tactics.name: Regroup
tactics.description: Return to castle and reduce revival

dialogue.greeting1:
A pleasure to meet you!
I am Zhang Zhao!
dialogue.greeting2:
My abilities will help you
in your battles!
dialogue.goBattleBefore:
Let me train the troops
so they don't mess up my plans!
dialogue.trainingExpect:
I sense today's training
will go splendidly!
dialogue.hunting: Hm, this is our only option.

name: Lu Xun
lore: A great strategist who led Wu after Zhou Yu and Lu Meng. With Lu Meng, he defeated Guan Yu in Jing. At Yiling, he crushed Shu's army with fire. He repelled every Wei invasion and rose to Chancellor.
battleCry: Lu Xun shall defend Wu's lands.

dialogue.greeting1:
It's an honor to meet you.
I am Lu Xun.
dialogue.greeting2:
With my abilities,
I'll surely save you in times of peril.
dialogue.goBattleBefore:
Let me train the troops
to ensure our strategies succeed.
dialogue.trainingExpect:
I sense today's training
will go well.

name: Lu Meng
lore: Served Sun Quan from youth. Once just a warrior, he dedicated himself to learning at Sun Quan's urging. After Lu Su's death, he led Wu's forces, defeated Guan Yu, and conquered Jing Province.
battleCry: Behold my brilliant strategy!

dialogue.greeting1:
It's an honor to meet you.
I am Lu Meng.
dialogue.greeting2:
I've come to help you
conquer the realm.
dialogue.greeting3:
My strategies will maximize Wu's power.
Please make good use of them.
dialogue.goBattleBefore:
Let me train the troops
to sharpen our abilities.
dialogue.trainingExpect:
The troops are eager.
Expect results.
dialogue.mockBattle:
I'll select two generals
for mock battle.

name: Lu Su
lore: Recommended by Zhou Yu to serve Sun Quan. He allied with Liu Bei, and when Cao Cao threatened Wu, urged battle. After Zhou Yu's death, he commanded all forces and maintained the alliance.
battleCry:
If we don't act now,
Cao Cao will swallow Wu whole!

dialogue.greeting1:
A pleasure to meet you!
I'm Lu Su - remember the name!
dialogue.greeting2:
My abilities work well
for both offense and defense.
dialogue.greeting3: Use them however you see fit!
dialogue.goBattleBefore:
Let me train the troops
to sharpen our abilities!
dialogue.trainingExpect: I sense today's training will go well!
dialogue.tokkun:
I'll select a general
for special training!

name: Jia Xu
lore: Dong Zhuo's strategist who served many lords. Later, as Zhang Xiu's advisor, he fought Cao Cao. His counsel was never wrong: when Zhang Xiu heeded him, he won; when he didn't, he lost.
battleCry: My wisdom yields endless stratagems.

dialogue.greeting1:
I am Jia Xu.
My lord, please remember the name.
dialogue.greeting2:
With my supreme strategies,
I shall deliver victory to you.
dialogue.goBattleBefore:
Allow me to train the troops
to perfect my strategies...
dialogue.trainingExpect:
Especially today,
I sense good results.
dialogue.hunting: A wise choice, I must say.

name: Zhang Jiao
lore: As leader of the Taiping faith, he led millions of Yellow Turbans against the Han. Though crushed, remnants rebelled for decades after, hastening the dynasty's collapse.
battleCry:
Fear not death! March on!
Heaven wills the Yellow Turbans' age!

dialogue.greeting1:
A pleasure to meet you!
I am Zhang Jiao!
dialogue.greeting2: Heaven itself guided us together!
dialogue.greeting3:
With my power,
we shall build a Yellow Turban realm!
dialogue.goBattleBefore:
Let me train to elevate
my abilities to the heavens!
dialogue.trainingExpect: Heaven says we'll succeed today!

name: Chen Gong
lore: First served Cao Cao, then betrayed him to welcome Lu Bu. As his strategist, he fought Cao Cao but lost when Lu Bu ignored his counsel. Captured and executed.
battleCry:
Chen Gong shall guide you
to victory...!!

dialogue.greeting1:
What an honor to meet you!
I am Chen Gong!
dialogue.greeting2:
With my abilities,
I'll surely guide you to greatness!
dialogue.goBattleBefore:
Please let me train the troops
to sharpen my strategies!
dialogue.trainingExpect:
Morale is high!
I promise results!
dialogue.mockBattle: I'll make the mock battle succeed!

name: Mi Heng
lore: A civil official of keen insight and cunning. Yet his arrogant nature led him to criticize without restraint. He served Cao Cao and Liu Biao but was exiled from both for his sharp tongue.
battleCry:
Hah! As if fools could
understand my genius!

dialogue.greeting1:
Yo, nice to meet ya!
I'm Mi Heng!
dialogue.greeting2:
My strategies are nothing like
those other fools' plans!
dialogue.greeting3:
I'm counting on you to use 'em right.
Let's do this!
dialogue.goBattleBefore:
Ugh, what a pain, but I'll train
the troops to pull off my plans!
dialogue.goBattle: What a drag, but let's fight!
dialogue.trainingExpect: Feelin' good today!

name: Li Ru
lore: Dong Zhuo's advisor who aided his terror. He poisoned the former emperor and Empress He. Facing the Coalition, he slew Yuan Shao's kin and defended Hulao Pass with Lu Bu.
battleCry:
Fools who defy us shall
pay for their sins in blood.

dialogue.greeting1:
Heh heh, pleased to meet you, my lord.
I am Li Ru.
dialogue.greeting2:
With my versatile abilities,
I shall aid your path to supremacy.
dialogue.goBattleBefore:
Allow me to train the troops
to add power to my strategies.
dialogue.goBattle:
To battle!
The realm shall be ours...!
dialogue.trainingExpect:
Heh heh...
Heh heh heh heh heh...
dialogue.hunting:
Good... We'll make them
regret being born.
